name: Defined lactate/sulfate chemostat medium (full composition in refs 11 and 36; not restated here) (PMC7242377)
description: Defined lactate/sulfate chemostat medium (full composition in refs 11 and 36; not restated here) — medium reported in PMC7242377 (complex/undefined base — extracts not BiGG-mappable).

provenance.citation: Medium composition from PMC7242377 (see GrowthDB record).
provenance.notes: Complex medium: chemically-defined portion mapped to BiGG; biological extracts listed in `unmapped`. Added via GrowthDB curation.

unmapped.name: lactate (limiting substrate, added stoichiometrically for ~50% sulfate consumption)
